summary: Frontend UI testing complete for Mira Pet OS Care Pillar cleanup features. All key features verified: GroomingFlowModal opens as 5-step wizard from both Care Services grid and MiraCarePlan section, VetVisitFlowModal opens from Vet Visits card with 5-step wizard and 10 visit reason options, all 8 Care subcategory tabs are visible and navigation works correctly with query params.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account with pet Mystique (Shih Tzu)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Care pillar FlowModal features verified working. GroomingFlowModal and VetVisitFlowModal both open correctly from multiple entry points. All 8 subcategory tabs visible and navigation works.

feature_1_grooming_flowmodal_from_care_g.notes: GroomingFlowModal opens from 'Grooming' card in All Care Services grid via [data-testid='care-service-grooming']

feature_2_grooming_5_step_wizard.notes: 5-step wizard verified: Step 1 (Mode Selection), Step 2 (Service Format), Step 3 (Services - conditional), Step 4 (Comfort & Behavior), Step 5 (Logistics). Progress bar shows 'Step X of 5'.

feature_3_grooming_step1_mode_selection.notes: Step 1 shows 3 mode options: 'At Home' (Groomer comes to you), 'Salon' (Visit a grooming salon), 'Let Mira Recommend' (Based on your pet's needs)

feature_4_grooming_step2_service_format.notes: Step 2 shows 4 format options: Individual Services, Full Groom, Bundle/Plan, Maintenance

feature_5_grooming_step3_comfort_behavio.notes: Comfort questions include: Comfortable with strangers?, Nervous during grooming?, Comfortable with dryer/noise?, Any biting/snap history?, Can stand for full session?

feature_6_vet_visit_flowmodal_opens.notes: VetVisitFlowModal opens from 'Vet Visits' card in All Care Services grid via [data-testid='care-service-vet_clinic_booking']

feature_7_vet_visit_5_step_wizard.notes: 5-step wizard verified with progress bar showing 'Step 1 of 5'. Pet context sidebar shows on right side.

feature_8_vet_visit_reason_options.notes: 10 visit reason options displayed: Routine check-up, Vaccination, Ear problem, Skin/Itchiness check, Senior wellness check, Digestive issues, Dental checkup, Follow-up visit, Other concerns, Let Mira Recommend

feature_9_care_subcategory_tabs_all_8.notes: All 8 subcategory tabs present with data-testid: grooming, vet_clinic_booking, boarding_daycare, pet_sitting, behavior_anxiety_support, senior_special_needs_support, nutrition_consult_booking, emergency_help

feature_10_subcategory_tab_navigation.notes: Clicking Grooming tab navigates to /care?type=grooming - URL query params work correctly

feature_11_mira_care_plan_grooming_butto.notes: MiraCarePlan section shows 'Book Mystique's Groom' button which opens GroomingFlowModal when clicked. Modal shows 'Grooming for Mystique' with pet photo.

feature_12_flowmodal_pet_context.notes: Both FlowModals show pet context strip with pet photo, name (Mystique), and breed (Shih Tzu)

screenshots_taken.description: Initial Care page showing 8 subcategory tabs and 8 service cards in grid
GroomingFlowModal Step 1 showing mode selection (At Home, Salon, Let Mira Recommend)
GroomingFlowModal Step 2 showing service format selection
GroomingFlowModal Step 3/4 showing comfort & behavior questions
VetVisitFlowModal Step 1 showing 10 visit reason options
GroomingFlowModal opened from MiraCarePlan 'Book Mystique's Groom' button
